_comment: SchemaStore catalog entry for ChainWeaver flow files (issue #139). Maintainer-facing: copy this object into the 'schemas' array of https://github.com/SchemaStore/schemastore/blob/master/src/api/json/catalog.json and open a PR there. Once accepted, VS Code (via redhat.vscode-yaml) and JetBrains IDEs offer autocomplete on .flow.yaml/.flow.json files with zero user-side setup.
name: ChainWeaver flow file
description: Deterministic tool-flow definition consumed by ChainWeaver's FlowExecutor (https://github.com/dgenio/ChainWeaver).
